_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of operational mission capabilities requirements, development, and pipelines.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of model deployment strategies, including batch inference, real-time serving, edge deployment, A/B testing, canary releases, and shadow deployments, and the infrastructure requirements and failure modes of each.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-023 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-A-001 (OP, cosine: 0.587), AI-K-017 (AI, cosine: 0.585).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.3/10 (raw 0.426). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, requirements]. DCWF-only terms [capabilities, development, mission, operational, pipelines] vs WIDAI-only terms [b, batch, canary, deployment, deployments, edge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.873 (P=0.909, R=0.840). P exceeds R by 0.070 — the DCWF element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 28 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (96.2%). "Knowledge of operational mission capabilities requirements, development, and pip" and "Knowledge of model deployment strategies, including batch inference, real-time s" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.607 > STS 0.426 (gap +0.181). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge, requirements] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.9%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, requirements]. DCWF-only: [capabilities, development, mission, operational, pipelines]. WIDAI-only: [b, batch, canary, deployment, deployments, edge].

signals.detail: STS 0.426 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.

Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.181 with low STS 0.426. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
